definition: A theoretical line (physically or mentally) followed from a point of origin or towards a destination. May be relative (e.g. up, left, outbound, dorsal), geographical (e.g. north), rotational (e.g. clockwise), or with respect to an object or location (e.g. toward Boston).
example: Keep going in the same direction.
exampleVi: Hãy tiếp tục đi theo cùng một hướng.

definition: A visual representation of an area, whether real or imaginary.
example: We need to understand the concept of map.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bản đồ.

definition: A course or way which is traveled or passed.
example: The route was used so much that it formed a rut.
exampleVi: Tuyến đường được sử dụng nhiều đến mức hình thành một lối mòn.

definition: (heading) To do with a place or places.
example: We need to understand the concept of way.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về con đường.

definition: A paved part of road, usually in a village or a town.
example: Walk down the street until you see a hotel on the right.
exampleVi: Đi xuống phố cho đến khi bạn nhìn thấy một khách sạn ở bên phải.

definition: A way used for travelling between places, originally one wide enough to allow foot passengers and horses to travel, now (US) usually one surfaced with asphalt or concrete and designed to accommodate many vehicles travelling in both directions. In the UK both senses are heard: a country road is the same as a country lane.
example: We need to understand the concept of road.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đường.

definition: A broad street, especially one bordered by trees.
example: We need to understand the concept of avenue.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đại lộ.

definition: A trail for the use of, or worn by, pedestrians.
example: We need to understand the concept of path.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về con đường.

definition: (heading) to make a non-linear physical movement.
example: We need to understand the concept of turn.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về lượt.

definition: The left side or direction.
example: We need to understand the concept of left.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bên trái.

definition: Straight, not bent.
example: a right line
exampleVi: một dòng bên phải

definition: Something that is not crooked or bent such as a part of a road or track.
example: We need to understand the concept of straight.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường thẳng.

definition: One of the eight players (comprising two props, one hooker, two locks, two flankers and one number eight, collectively known as the pack) whose primary task is to gain and maintain possession of the ball (compare back).
example: We need to understand the concept of forward.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phía trước.

definition: The rear of the body, especially the part between the neck and the end of the spine and opposite the chest and belly.
example: Could you please scratch my back?
exampleVi: Bạn có thể vui lòng gãi lưng cho tôi được không?

definition: The state behind or past.
example: We need to understand the concept of backward.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lạc hậu.

definition: One of the four major compass points, specifically 0°, directed toward the North Pole, and conventionally upwards on a map, abbreviated as N.
example: Minnesota is in the north of the USA.
exampleVi: Minnesota nằm ở phía bắc nước Mỹ.

definition: One of the four major compass points, specifically 180°, directed toward the South Pole, and conventionally downwards on a map, abbreviated as S.
example: We need to understand the concept of south.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về miền nam.

definition: One of the four principal compass points, specifically 90°, conventionally directed to the right on maps; the direction of the rising sun at an equinox. Abbreviated as E.
example: We need to understand the concept of east.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phương đông.

definition: One of the four principal compass points, specifically 270°, conventionally directed to the left on maps; the direction of the setting sun at an equinox, abbreviated as W.
example: We need to understand the concept of west.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm của phương Tây.

definition: The point where two converging lines meet; an angle, either external or internal.
example: The corners of the wire mesh were reinforced with little blobs of solder.
exampleVi: Các góc của lưới thép được gia cố bằng những đốm hàn nhỏ.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word intersection.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ giao nhau.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word roundabout.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ roundabout.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word signpost.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ biển chỉ dẫn.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word gps.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ gps.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word location.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ vị trí.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word position.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ vị trí.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word distance.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ khoảng cách.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word mile.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ dặm.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word kilometer.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ km.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word block.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng khối từ.

definition: To place; to set in a particular spot or position.
example: We need to understand the concept of locate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm định vị.

definition: The act of joining, or the state of being joined.
example: We need to understand the concept of junction.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mối nối.

definition: The theory, practice and technology of charting a course for a ship, aircraft or spaceship or (colloquially) road vehicle.
example: We need to understand the concept of navigation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm điều hướng.

definition: A mark left by something that has passed along.
example: Can you see any tracks in the snow?
exampleVi: Bạn có thấy dấu vết nào trên tuyết không?

definition: A written schedule of activities for a vacation or road trip.
example: We need to understand the concept of itinerary.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hành trình.

definition: A magnetic or electronic device used to determine the cardinal directions (usually magnetic or true north).
example: We need to understand the concept of compass.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm la bàn.

definition: The track or indication marking the route followed by something that has passed, such as the footprints of animal on land or the contrail of an airplane in the sky.
example: We need to understand the concept of trail.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường mòn.

definition: Usually preceded by the: a region or a part of the world to the east of a certain place; countries of Asia, the East (especially East Asia).
example: We need to understand the concept of orient.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm định hướng.

definition: An object that marks the boundary of a piece of land (usually a stone, or a tree).
example: We need to understand the concept of landmark.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cột mốc.

definition: A pronged tool having a long straight handle, used for digging, lifting, throwing etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of fork.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về ngã ba.

definition: A divided highway where intersections and direct access to adjacent properties have been eliminated.
example: We need to understand the concept of expressway.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường cao tốc.

definition: A motor vehicle for transporting large numbers of people along roads.
example: We need to understand the concept of highway.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường cao tốc.

definition: The act of destining or appointing.
example: We need to understand the concept of destination.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đích đến.

definition: A road designed for safe, high-speed operation of motor vehicles through the elimination of at-grade intersections, usually divided and having at least two lanes in each direction; a dual carriageway with no at-grade crossings, a motorway.
example: We need to understand the concept of freeway.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường cao tốc.

definition: A frame consisting of two bars crossing each other at right angles and turning on a post or pin, to hinder the passage of animals, but admitting a person to pass between the arms; a turnstile.
example: We need to understand the concept of turnpike.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thu phí.

definition: Closeness; the state of being near as in space, time, or relationship.
example: The proximity of the heat source allowed it to be detected by the sensor.
exampleVi: Khoảng cách gần của nguồn nhiệt cho phép cảm biến phát hiện ra nó.

definition: Loss or damage incurred through a disaster.
example: The war has taken its toll on the people.
exampleVi: Chiến tranh đã gây thiệt hại nặng nề cho người dân.

definition: A going; journey; travel; voyage; course; passage.
example: We need to understand the concept of fare.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về giá vé.

definition: Proximity; the state of being near.
example: There was a crackling sound in the vicinity of my right ear.
exampleVi: Có một âm thanh tanh tách vang lên bên tai phải của tôi.

definition: The total distance travelled in miles or in air miles.
example: We need to understand the concept of mileage.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về số km.

definition: A diversion or deviation from one's original route.
example: We need to understand the concept of detour.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đường vòng.
